title: Ziyad's governorship over al -Basrah
description: I was told by'Umar-'Ali-some knowledgeable people: When Ziyad came to al-Kufah, al-Mughirah supposed that he came as governor over al-Kufah. Ziyad stayed in the house of Salman b. 2 5 8. Cairo reads: Ibn 'Abd 'Amr.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 18
